title: Magic Items
body:
## Welcome to [Magic Items]
The Datapack that will upgrade your experience!

Click to join the [**COMMUNITY SERVER**](https://discord.gg/BHUG77PnJu)

### Information
- Check the Knowledge Book (Show All) to see the recipes
- /reload if you experience bugs!

- You can Choose if you want this option below.

![Allow Commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/930e252c74912e7ec7a4aabdb861a78398806442.png)
#

### Instruction (If You want to download for just the world)
- Click on DOWNLOAD
- Select a Version
- Select Platform (DATAPACK)
- Create new world
- Press More Button
- Press "Data Packs"
- OPEN PACK FOLDER and put the datapack inside

### **How to Install [Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rp-magicitems)**
#
### Look at [GALLERY](https://modrinth.com/datapack/magic-items/gallery) if you want to some of the items.
#

## Structures:
### The New Structures are Pillager Campsite and End Bunkers
- Pillager Campsites have only one variation. 
- End Bunkers have three variations.

- The third variation of the end bunker has two chest instead of one!

## New Items:
### Nuke Bow (Obainable from End Bunkers)
- Summons a nuclear explosion where the arrow lands.
### Totem Of Vanishing (Obtainable from Mansions or Pillager Campsites)
- Drop it to summon a decoy and vanish.

## Items:
- Magnet Sword: Right Click to teleport the nearest entity/items in a radius of blocks.
- Ominous Sword: Right Click to damage a entity in 10 blocks distance.
- Dragon Sword: Right Click to summon a end crystal.
- End Pickaxe: Right Click to spawn a Ender Chest.
- Golem Sword: Right Click to gain resistance.
- End Wand: Right Click to teleport (Goes through blocks).
- Poison Wand: Right Click to poison entity in 10 blocks distance.
- Lava Sword: Right Click to trap your enemies in lava.
- TNT Sword: Right Click to summon a TNT on your head.
- Echo Sword: Right Click to summon a echo charge on a entity in 10 blocks distance.
- Gravity Hammer: Right Click to switch gravity.
- Helmet Of Undying: When a totem pops, you will get Resistance for 3 seconds.
- Null Wand: Right Click to clear all effects on players in 5 blocks distance.
- Scythe: Right Click to summon a horde of zombies.
- Blackhole Sword: Right Click to put your enemies in a blackhole.
- Meteor Wand: Right Click to summon meteors.
- Emerald Sword: Right Click to heal.
- Ice Wand: Right Click to freeze the water.
- Anvil Sword: Right Click to spawn anvils on entity.
- Cobweb Sword: Right Click to spawn cobweb on entity.
- Chaos Wand: This wand shuffles between 5 different abilities each time you activate it with Right Click.
#
### Chaos Wand Abilities
- The First Ability is **LIGHTNING**, summons a lightning on a entity (15 Blocks Radius)
- The Second Ability is **METEOR WAND** which summons meteors around the summoner.
- The Third Ability is **EMERALD SWORD** which gives you regeneration for 5 seconds.
- The Fourth Ability is **GRAVITY HAMMER** which launches you into the sky.
- The Fifth Ability is **ZOMBIE WAVE** which summons 5 zombies where you look.
Basically 4 of the abilities are combinations of 3 wands and 1 sword. Fixes
#

## Removed Items
### **EXPLOSIVE PICKAXE**
- Replaced with TNT Sword (1.4+) 
your hand!
### **FIRE SWORD**
- Replaced with Blazing Wand (2.0+)
### **ICE SWORD**
- Replaced with Ice Wand (2.0+)
### **POISON SWORD**
- Replaced with Poison Wand (2.0+)
### **NULL SWORD**
- Replaced with Null Wand (2.0+)
